name: Maclos Capital Inc.
summary: Maclos Capital Inc. does not have significant operations. The company intends to identify and evaluate assets or businesses with a view to potentially acquiring them or acquiring an interest therein. Previously, it was involved in developing and commercializing software-based products to be used as decision support tools for obstetricians. The company was formerly known as LMS Medical Systems Inc. and changed its name to Maclos Capital Inc. in July 2012. Maclos Capital Inc. was founded in 1993 and is based in Toronto, Canada.
